parameters.subject: =Your Prisoncall number is now active
parameters.bodyContent:
=Hi,

Your Prisoncall number {{ $json.did }} is now active for {{ $json.prison_name }}.

Calls from the prison will now ring your mobile. Remember to press 1 to accept each call.

If you have any questions, just reply to this email.

Thanks,
The Prisoncall Team

parameters.content:
## Workflow 1 - New Subscriber
Trigger: Stripe checkout.session.completed (Stripe webhook -> this n8n webhook /new-subscriber).

**Path A** (DID available): order DID via proxy -> mock 3CX -> ClickSend (PRISONCALL) -> Outlook email.
**Path B** (all exchanges OOS): submit Request Numbers -> notify owner -> WF4 watches inbox. 24h no-response -> owner alert.
**Path C** (bundle / existing customer second plan): PLACEHOLDER ONLY - bundle flag is captured in Extract Checkout Data; full handling builds after the sign-in flow.

All VoipLine calls route through the Cloudflare Worker proxy. All 3CX calls are MOCKED.
